summary: Completed Phase 2 testing of AdsGupta Ecosystem Re-Architecture. All marketplace features, TalentOS section, and CTA links are working correctly. Backend API (12/12 tests) and Frontend UI (all flows verified).
test_credentials: No credentials needed - public pages tested
seed_data_creation: Created test leads during testing with marketplace source tracking (walmart, blinkit, swiggy, zomato waitlists)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 multi-marketplace features verified. All marketplace context switcher tabs, notify modals, and lead capture APIs working. TalentOS section on /tools page verified with correct external link.
passed_tests: Backend Tests (12/12 passed):
- Lead capture for Walmart marketplace waitlist
- Lead capture for Blinkit marketplace waitlist
- Lead capture for Swiggy Instamart marketplace waitlist
- Lead capture for Zomato marketplace waitlist
- Lead capture handles duplicate emails ('Welcome back!' message)
- Lead capture rejects invalid email format (422)
- Lead capture works without marketplace field (backward compatibility)
- Health endpoint returns healthy status with database connected
- /audit page accessible
- /tools page accessible
- /marketplacesolutions page accessible
- Lead count endpoint returns numeric count
Frontend Tests (all passed):
- /audit page: Marketplace Context Switcher renders with Amazon, Walmart, Others tabs
- Amazon tab is active by default showing audit dropzone
- Clicking Walmart tab opens 'Notify Me' modal with email form
- Walmart modal shows 'Protocol in Development' badge and 'Walmart Audit Engine' title
- 'Notify Me at Launch' button captures lead to backend API
- Lead capture shows 'You're on the List!' success message
- Others dropdown shows Quick Commerce options: Blinkit, Swiggy Instamart, Zomato
- Blinkit from Others dropdown opens correct notify modal
- /tools page: TalentOS section with 'Career & Interview Tools' badge
- TalentOS heading visible with Interview AI Coach and Career Path Navigator cards
- 'Launch TalentOS' button correctly links to https://talentos.adsgupta.com
- /marketplacesolutions page: 'Explore Demo Universe' CTA links to https://demoai.adsgupta.com/amazon-audit
- Platform badges (Amazon, Walmart, Blinkit) visible on marketplace solutions page
- Instant Audit card and Seller Dashboard card visible

mocked_apis.note: TalentOS subdomain (talentos.adsgupta.com) is external - link exists but leads to external domain not yet deployed

fixes_applied: Updated /app/backend/routes/leads.py to accept 'marketplace' field for marketplace waitlist lead capture with source tracking
